name: agra_sample_qa
description: Small local QA set for AGRAGraph portfolio benchmark.

questions.query: How many nodes does the AGRAGraph graph use?
Which retriever is used for factual queries?
questions.expected_answer: Factual queries use BM25 keyword retrieval.

questions.query: What happens when the generated answer is hallucinated?
questions.expected_answer: The graph refines the query and loops back while retries remain.

questions.query: Does AGRAGraph require an external vector database?
questions.expected_answer: No. It uses an in-memory numpy-backed DocumentStore.

questions.query: Why does the project include a local benchmark?
questions.expected_answer: The benchmark provides a small reproducible portfolio comparison.
